title: Choose the Time and Date Format on Mobile Application
excerpt: Hello everyone, we have the option to change the time and date format on the Monday app on the computer, but it is not available on the mobile version. I find this a bit unfortunate.

posts.author: kenny_skope (kenny sköpe)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello everyone, we have the option to change the time and date format on the Monday app on the computer, but it is not available on the mobile version. I find this a bit unfortunate.
